_comment: FundedNext Free Trial 100K (login 34424190, MT5 Swap, FundedNext-Server3). Rules VERIFIED 2026-07-09 by a 4-pass research workflow with conservative reconciliation; see reports/ commit for provenance. Risk numbers are real. EA policy: NOT permitted on the Free Trial by default (ea_permitted=false) — the guard blocks the bot from trading on any FundedNext server. Re-verify EA policy and daily-loss basis in-dashboard before ever flipping ea_permitted true (would require the paid EA add-on).
daily_anchor: max_of_balance_equity_at_server_rollover (conservative: floors early, floating losses counted)
rollover_timezone: 00:00 server time = GMT+3 in July DST, reverts to GMT+2 in winter; engine uses server-time day boundary so it tracks the shift automatically
ea_allowed: NOT permitted on Free Trial by default — paid EA add-on required to enable; breach if run without it

prohibited_strategy_thresholds.quick_strike: >=30% of profit from trades closed within 30s
prohibited_strategy_thresholds.gambling: risk >3% of initial balance per trade
prohibited_strategy_thresholds.hyperactivity: >200 trades/day or >2000 server messages/day (breach on 3rd occurrence)
prohibited_strategy_thresholds.settlement_window: disproportionate profit 00:00-02:00 server time is voided

consistency_rule: no percentage best-day rule on CFD/Free-Trial accounts (that is Futures-only); prohibited-strategy thresholds above DO apply
